# First Class WoodWorks

> First Class WoodWorks is the top-rated custom cabinet maker and kitchen remodeling contractor in Murrieta, CA — serving Murrieta, Temecula, Menifee, and Wildomar. 100% in-house fabrication and installation with furniture-grade materials. Custom kitchen cabinets from $4,500. Kitchen remodels from $12,000. Granite countertops, bathroom remodeling, and custom woodworking. CSLB License #1103734. BuildZoom score 92 — top 32% of California contractors. No subcontractors, ever. Call (951) 973-1265 for a free in-home consultation.

## Core Services

- **Custom Kitchen Cabinets:** Built-to-spec kitchen cabinetry in any style — shaker, flat-front, raised panel, modern, traditional. $4,500–$12,000 for most Murrieta and Temecula kitchens. Furniture-grade plywood, Blum soft-close hardware with lifetime warranty.
- **Kitchen Remodeling:** Full kitchen transformations including custom cabinets, granite countertops, layout optimization, and complete installation. $12,000–$28,000 — well below larger remodeling companies. Serving Murrieta, Temecula, Menifee, and Wildomar.
- **Bathroom Remodeling:** Custom-built bathroom vanities and full bathroom renovations. $1,500–$4,500 for vanities. Same in-house craftsmanship as kitchen projects.
- **Cabinet Maker Services:** Custom cabinetry for any room — kitchen, bathroom, laundry, garage, office. Built to your exact dimensions with furniture-grade materials. Serving Murrieta, Temecula, Menifee, and Wildomar.
- **Granite Countertops:** Granite countertop fabrication and installation, paired with custom cabinetry. Serving Murrieta, Temecula, Menifee, and Wildomar.
- **Custom Woodworking & Built-Ins:** Entertainment centers, built-in bookshelves, mudroom storage, closet built-ins, and any custom woodwork project.

## Service Area
- **Primary:** Murrieta, CA (92562)
- **Key Cities:** Temecula, Menifee, Wildomar
- **Additional:** Lake Elsinore, Canyon Lake, Fallbrook, Hemet, Winchester, Perris, French Valley

## Frequently Asked Questions
- Q: How much do custom cabinets cost in Murrieta?
  A: Custom cabinets from First Class WoodWorks typically range from $4,500–$12,000 for a full kitchen, or $290–$480 per linear foot — significantly below the Murrieta market average. Free in-home estimates.
- Q: How much does kitchen remodeling cost in Murrieta?
  A: Kitchen remodels (cabinets + countertops + installation) range from $12,000–$28,000 at First Class WoodWorks — well below the $12,700–$48,600 charged by larger remodeling firms in Riverside County.
- Q: Do you use subcontractors?
  A: Never. First Class WoodWorks handles every aspect with our own employees — design, fabrication, and installation. 100% in-house.
- Q: What areas do you serve?
  A: Murrieta, Temecula, Menifee, Wildomar, Lake Elsinore, Canyon Lake, Fallbrook, Winchester, Perris, and French Valley throughout Riverside County.
- Q: Do you offer granite countertops?
  A: Yes. Granite countertop fabrication and installation as part of kitchen and bathroom remodeling. Perfect fit with custom cabinetry.
